field.name: note1
field.label: You must set up a scheduled Task: php joomla.php ra_dlivery:pollactivity

field.name: smtp2go_api_site_id
field.label: SMTP2GO API site
field.description: Select the #__ra_api_sites record used for SMTP2GO activity polling
field.query: SELECT id AS value, CONCAT(title, ' (', id, ')') AS text FROM #__ra_api_sites WHERE state=1 ORDER BY title

field.name: subdomain
field.label: Sender subdomain filter
field.description: Optional substring filter applied to the sender value before events are stored

field.name: event_types
field.label: Monitored event types
field.description: Select SMTP2GO activity events to ingest. Unsubscribe and resubscribe events are intentionally excluded.

field.name: lookback_minutes
field.label: Overlap lookback in minutes
field.description: Minutes to subtract from the stored watermark to avoid missing late-arriving events

field.name: page_limit
field.label: Events per page
field.description: Maximum events to request per activity search call

field.name: tidy_up_days
field.label: Tidy-up retention days
field.description: Optional retention period. After polling completes, stored event rows older than this many days will be deleted
